mapper.select: SELECT er.*, ei.name AS indicator_name, ei.default_weight AS indicator_weight FROM evaluation_record er LEFT JOIN evaluation_indicator ei ON er.indicator_id = ei.id WHERE er.id = #{id}
SELECT er.*, ei.name AS indicator_name, ei.default_weight AS indicator_weight FROM evaluation_record er LEFT JOIN evaluation_indicator ei ON er.indicator_id = ei.id WHERE er.result_id = #{resultId}
SELECT er.*, ei.name AS indicator_name, ei.default_weight AS indicator_weight FROM evaluation_record er LEFT JOIN evaluation_indicator ei ON er.indicator_id = ei.id ORDER BY er.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO evaluation_record (result_id, indicator_id, ai_score, teacher_score, final_score, score_ratio, ai_comment, teacher_comment) VALUES (#{resultId}, #{indicatorId}, #{aiScore}, #{teacherScore}, #{finalScore}, #{scoreRatio}, #{aiComment}, #{teacherComment})
mapper.update: UPDATE evaluation_record SET score_ratio = #{scoreRatio}, final_score = CASE WHEN teacher_score IS NOT NULL AND teacher_score > 0 THEN ROUND(ai_score * #{scoreRatio} / 10 + teacher_score * (10 - #{scoreRatio}) / 10, 2) ELSE ai_score END WHERE result_id = #{resultId}
